tags.name: Ettimadai
tags.note: Ettimadai is a railway station in the Coimbatore suburb of Ettimadai, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located between Madukkarai and Walayar. Trains from Coimbatore Junction railway station and Podanur Junction railway station heading to Palakkad Junction railwa

tags.description: Sulur Road is a railway station in the Coimbatore suburb of Sulur, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located between Tiruppur Somanur and Irugur Junction.
tags.name: Sulur Road

tags.name: Irugur Junction
tags.note:
Irugur Junction is a railway station in Irugur, Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India.
The station has two platforms and is a junction on the Coimbatore Junction–Erode Junction main line with branch line towards Mettupalayam.
